info.title: Expense Reimbursement API
info.description:
Internal API for the expense reimbursement workflow. It supports authentication, employee claim submission, manager approval, finance disbursement, and admin user management.

This documentation is intended for frontend developers, QA, and integrators working with the reimbursement platform.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current user profile and admin-level user operations

tags.name: Claims
tags.description: Claim creation, updates, submission, review, and disbursement

get.summary: List claims visible to manager, finance, or admin
Get a claim with its action history

delete.summary: Delete a claim owned by the employee

get.summary: Get pending claims for managers, finance, and admin

bill.description: Optional bill image upload. JPEG, PNG, or WEBP up to 5 MB.
